records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. You're pretty good, I'll give you that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. You're pretty good, I'll give you that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. You're pretty good, I'll give you that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This's exactly why I never wanted to get involved with the Holy Curia's mad dogs...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This's exactly why I never wanted to get involved with the Holy Curia's mad dogs...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This's exactly why I never wanted to get involved with the Holy Curia's mad dogs...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, heretic!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, heretic!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, heretic!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is your final warning. If we fail to execute that betrayer, many people will be hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is your final warning. If we fail to execute that betrayer, many people will be hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is your final warning. If we fail to execute that betrayer, many people will be hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if they are heretics, are you saying a priest who serves the Lord will simply stand by and watch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if they are heretics, are you saying a priest who serves the Lord will simply stand by and watch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if they are heretics, are you saying a priest who serves the Lord will simply stand by and watch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, judging by the market, our Lord does not seem to be reacting much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, judging by the market, our Lord does not seem to be reacting much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, judging by the market, our Lord does not seem to be reacting much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've always thought Charade-related stocks needed to drop a bit anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've always thought Charade-related stocks needed to drop a bit anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've always thought Charade-related stocks needed to drop a bit anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stocks? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stocks? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stocks? What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, did I not mention? The only "Lord" I believe in is money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did I not mention? The only "Lord" I believe in is money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, did I not mention? The only "Lord" I believe in is money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing in this world that can perform the miracle of feeding the multitudes is stocks, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing in this world that can perform the miracle of feeding the multitudes is stocks, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing in this world that can perform the miracle of feeding the multitudes is stocks, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Money? What kind of blasphemy is this...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Money? What kind of blasphemy is this...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Money? What kind of blasphemy is this...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? Saw blades...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? Saw blades...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? Saw blades...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They keep chasing me like debt collectors coming to squeeze money out of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They keep chasing me like debt collectors coming to squeeze money out of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They keep chasing me like debt collectors coming to squeeze money out of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once my chainsaw is fired, it never stops.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once my chainsaw is fired, it never stops.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once my chainsaw is fired, it never stops.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want all your limbs shredded, get lost, you halfwits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want all your limbs shredded, get lost, you halfwits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want all your limbs shredded, get lost, you halfwits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, pretty vicious for a kid, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, pretty vicious for a kid, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, pretty vicious for a kid, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But our kid isn't lacking when it comes to being completely unhinged either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But our kid isn't lacking when it comes to being completely unhinged either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But our kid isn't lacking when it comes to being completely unhinged either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Katharina...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Katharina...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Katharina...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know, Junk food!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know, Junk food!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know, Junk food!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O.? Perfect! That should be fun to carve up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O.? Perfect! That should be fun to carve up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O.? Perfect! That should be fun to carve up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fall back, Sister Looper!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fall back, Sister Looper!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fall back, Sister Looper!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ones summoned by Goetia are incorporeal spirits without physical bodies!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ones summoned by Goetia are incorporeal spirits without physical bodies!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ones summoned by Goetia are incorporeal spirits without physical bodies!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are a terrible match for your Counter abilities!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are a terrible match for your Counter abilities!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are a terrible match for your Counter abilities!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, I don't care about that...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, I don't care about that...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, I don't care about that...!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Honestly, you really are
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Honestly, you really are
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Honestly, you really are
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-why did Goetia suddenly close...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-why did Goetia suddenly close...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-why did Goetia suddenly close...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are countless <color=#ffd34c>forbidden books</color> in the Holy Curia's secret library.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are countless <color=#ffd34c>forbidden books</color> in the Holy Curia's secret library.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are countless <color=#ffd34c>forbidden books</color> in the Holy Curia's secret library.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each of them holds a dangerous power...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each of them holds a dangerous power...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each of them holds a dangerous power...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as long as they are books made of <color=#ffd34c>paper</color>, they cannot escape my ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as long as they are books made of <color=#ffd34c>paper</color>, they cannot escape my ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as long as they are books made of <color=#ffd34c>paper</color>, they cannot escape my ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I was the librarian of that place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I was the librarian of that place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I was the librarian of that place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you looked familiar. Now I see why.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you looked familiar. Now I see why.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you looked familiar. Now I see why.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are an apprentice nun of the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are an apprentice nun of the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are an apprentice nun of the Holy Curia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would a nun who serves the Lord cooperate with a betrayer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would a nun who serves the Lord cooperate with a betrayer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would a nun who serves the Lord cooperate with a betrayer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To begin with, why did you become a heretic?
records.m_Talk_DEU: To begin with, why did you become a heretic?
records.m_Talk_FRA: To begin with, why did you become a heretic?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I entered the Holy Curia was because of a curse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I entered the Holy Curia was because of a curse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I entered the Holy Curia was because of a curse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After my body became one that could only drink the blood of others, I realized something...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After my body became one that could only drink the blood of others, I realized something...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After my body became one that could only drink the blood of others, I realized something...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That the Lord in the heavens saves no one at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That the Lord in the heavens saves no one at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That the Lord in the heavens saves no one at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The end of the world is slowly approaching even as we speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The end of the world is slowly approaching even as we speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The end of the world is slowly approaching even as we speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the depths of the abyss, there are unimaginable beings that could destroy this world on a whim.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the depths of the abyss, there are unimaginable beings that could destroy this world on a whim.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the depths of the abyss, there are unimaginable beings that could destroy this world on a whim.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what is "our" God doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what is "our" God doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what is "our" God doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what about our arrogant priests who call themselves the messengers of God?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what about our arrogant priests who call themselves the messengers of God?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what about our arrogant priests who call themselves the messengers of God?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Father said this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Father said this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Father said this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That the only ones who can save us are ourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That the only ones who can save us are ourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That the only ones who can save us are ourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know about Junk food, but I believe those words. So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know about Junk food, but I believe those words. So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know about Junk food, but I believe those words. So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Katharina, look at the sky...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Katharina, look at the sky...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Katharina, look at the sky...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A <color=#ffd34c>whale</color>...? Why is that in the sky...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A <color=#ffd34c>whale</color>...? Why is that in the sky...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>whale</color>...? Why is that in the sky...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could that C.O. be...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could that C.O. be...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could that C.O. be...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, hurry! We must stop the betrayer at once...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, hurry! We must stop the betrayer at once...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, hurry! We must stop the betrayer at once...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Otherwise, something irreversible will happen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Otherwise, something irreversible will happen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Otherwise, something irreversible will happen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have eyes, then look carefully!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have eyes, then look carefully!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have eyes, then look carefully!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this situation he has brought about, where exactly is salvation supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this situation he has brought about, where exactly is salvation supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this situation he has brought about, where exactly is salvation supposed to be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, like we would...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, like we would...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, like we would...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just let him go, Puppy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just let him go, Puppy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just let him go, Puppy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sis? What do you mean, let him go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sis? What do you mean, let him go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sis? What do you mean, let him go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The situation has changed. Looks like things did not go well for Father either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The situation has changed. Looks like things did not go well for Father either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The situation has changed. Looks like things did not go well for Father either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought he would play that <color=#ffd34c>card</color> within the Society's estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought he would play that <color=#ffd34c>card</color> within the Society's estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought he would play that <color=#ffd34c>card</color> within the Society's estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Card...? You mean that whale?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Card...? You mean that whale?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Card...? You mean that whale?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. The moment he summoned it, we lost any justification to help Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. The moment he summoned it, we lost any justification to help Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. The moment he summoned it, we lost any justification to help Father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was the <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was the <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was the <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Contract...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Contract...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Contract...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: From here on out, help the Dean of Law and take that thing down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From here on out, help the Dean of Law and take that thing down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From here on out, help the Dean of Law and take that thing down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want to be suspected, you will need to earn some credit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want to be suspected, you will need to earn some credit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want to be suspected, you will need to earn some credit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can handle that, right, Puppy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can handle that, right, Puppy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can handle that, right, Puppy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, what a pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, what a pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, what a pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sis, just what is that whale anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sis, just what is that whale anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sis, just what is that whale anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you serious? It's a Category 5 C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you serious? It's a Category 5 C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you serious? It's a Category 5 C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even within the Grand Dimension Crevice, there's no way a Category 5 would suddenly appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even within the Grand Dimension Crevice, there's no way a Category 5 would suddenly appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even within the Grand Dimension Crevice, there's no way a Category 5 would suddenly appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are currently reviewing the observation equipment and data...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are currently reviewing the observation equipment and data...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are currently reviewing the observation equipment and data...

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, Senior Werner did say that the Counterside Effect can always involve exceptions...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, Senior Werner did say that the Counterside Effect can always involve exceptions...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, Senior Werner did say that the Counterside Effect can always involve exceptions...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. You contacted the Official Counter on site, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. You contacted the Official Counter on site, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. You contacted the Official Counter on site, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... Miss Ozymandias is currently unreachable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... Miss Ozymandias is currently unreachable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... Miss Ozymandias is currently unreachable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, Ozymandias...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, Ozymandias...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, Ozymandias...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Signature type confirmed. Huh? This data is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Signature type confirmed. Huh? This data is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Signature type confirmed. Huh? This data is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This C.O. has a record of having been neutralized once by the Lotus Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This C.O. has a record of having been neutralized once by the Lotus Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This C.O. has a record of having been neutralized once by the Lotus Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Code Name: <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Code Name: <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Code Name: <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had only heard about it from my mentor. This is my first time seeing it in person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had only heard about it from my mentor. This is my first time seeing it in person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had only heard about it from my mentor. This is my first time seeing it in person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The bizarre incident where an entire city vanished from people's memories, the Great Gyre...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The bizarre incident where an entire city vanished from people's memories, the Great Gyre...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The bizarre incident where an entire city vanished from people's memories, the Great Gyre...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years ago. The result of an incomplete ritual that took place in Lotus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years ago. The result of an incomplete ritual that took place in Lotus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years ago. The result of an incomplete ritual that took place in Lotus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I heard Varunastra was recently neutralized by the Lotus Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I heard Varunastra was recently neutralized by the Lotus Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I heard Varunastra was recently neutralized by the Lotus Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how are you able to control that thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how are you able to control that thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how are you able to control that thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra, you say...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra, you say...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra, you say...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is not its original name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is not its original name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is not its original name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Using Divinity as a medium, I merely summoned a <color=#ffd34c>nameless being</color> from the abyss into reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Using Divinity as a medium, I merely summoned a <color=#ffd34c>nameless being</color> from the abyss into reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Using Divinity as a medium, I merely summoned a <color=#ffd34c>nameless being</color> from the abyss into reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But reality had no vessel capable of containing it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But reality had no vessel capable of containing it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But reality had no vessel capable of containing it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So its rank degraded, and it fused with a ship and its crew that were present there, giving birth to that thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So its rank degraded, and it fused with a ship and its crew that were present there, giving birth to that thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So its rank degraded, and it fused with a ship and its crew that were present there, giving birth to that thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, it was born a malformed abomination from the very start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, it was born a malformed abomination from the very start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, it was born a malformed abomination from the very start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Much like us humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Much like us humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Much like us humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I recreated the tragedy of that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I recreated the tragedy of that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I recreated the tragedy of that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that you would struggle even more within this painful reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that you would struggle even more within this painful reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that you would struggle even more within this painful reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By using the Divinity Fragment given to me by <color=#ffd34c>that man</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By using the Divinity Fragment given to me by <color=#ffd34c>that man</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By using the Divinity Fragment given to me by <color=#ffd34c>that man</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That man...? The leader of the cult, I presume?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That man...? The leader of the cult, I presume?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That man...? The leader of the cult, I presume?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The time of revelation draws near.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The time of revelation draws near.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The time of revelation draws near.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then allow me to wish you good luck, Lamda Spatari.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then allow me to wish you good luck, Lamda Spatari.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then allow me to wish you good luck, Lamda Spatari.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I would let you escape...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I would let you escape...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I would let you escape...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am, watch out...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am, watch out...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am, watch out...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A hemomancy barrier...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A hemomancy barrier...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hemomancy barrier...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness. You're not injured, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness. You're not injured, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness. You're not injured, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are late, Religion Department. And why are you interfering?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are late, Religion Department. And why are you interfering?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are late, Religion Department. And why are you interfering?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry... I was worried you might get hurt, ma'am...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry... I was worried you might get hurt, ma'am...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry... I was worried you might get hurt, ma'am...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why are you making such a fuss even after being saved?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why are you making such a fuss even after being saved?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why are you making such a fuss even after being saved?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you are a department member, show proper respect to a dean.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you are a department member, show proper respect to a dean.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you are a department member, show proper respect to a dean.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Respect? We're about the same age, aren't we? Do we really need that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Respect? We're about the same age, aren't we? Do we really need that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Respect? We're about the same age, aren't we? Do we really need that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that is no way to speak to the Dean of Law!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that is no way to speak to the Dean of Law!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that is no way to speak to the Dean of Law!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please read the room. At this rate, we're both going to get killed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please read the room. At this rate, we're both going to get killed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please read the room. At this rate, we're both going to get killed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why should I? The only person I watch my attitude around is the one paying me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why should I? The only person I watch my attitude around is the one paying me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why should I? The only person I watch my attitude around is the one paying me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the situation is urgent, I will postpone etiquette training for later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the situation is urgent, I will postpone etiquette training for later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the situation is urgent, I will postpone etiquette training for later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, eliminating that C.O. that has trespassed into the Society's estate takes priority.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, eliminating that C.O. that has trespassed into the Society's estate takes priority.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, eliminating that C.O. that has trespassed into the Society's estate takes priority.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. You're pretty good, I'll give you that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. You're pretty good, I'll give you that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. You're pretty good, I'll give you that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This's exactly why I never wanted to get involved with the Holy Curia's mad dogs...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This's exactly why I never wanted to get involved with the Holy Curia's mad dogs...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This's exactly why I never wanted to get involved with the Holy Curia's mad dogs...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, heretic!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, heretic!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, heretic!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is your final warning. If we fail to execute that betrayer, many people will be hurt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is your final warning. If we fail to execute that betrayer, many people will be hurt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is your final warning. If we fail to execute that betrayer, many people will be hurt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if they are heretics, are you saying a priest who serves the Lord will simply stand by and watch?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if they are heretics, are you saying a priest who serves the Lord will simply stand by and watch?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if they are heretics, are you saying a priest who serves the Lord will simply stand by and watch?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, judging by the market, our Lord does not seem to be reacting much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, judging by the market, our Lord does not seem to be reacting much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, judging by the market, our Lord does not seem to be reacting much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've always thought Charade-related stocks needed to drop a bit anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've always thought Charade-related stocks needed to drop a bit anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've always thought Charade-related stocks needed to drop a bit anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stocks? What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stocks? What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stocks? What are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, did I not mention? The only "Lord" I believe in is money.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did I not mention? The only "Lord" I believe in is money.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, did I not mention? The only "Lord" I believe in is money.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing in this world that can perform the miracle of feeding the multitudes is stocks, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing in this world that can perform the miracle of feeding the multitudes is stocks, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing in this world that can perform the miracle of feeding the multitudes is stocks, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Money? What kind of blasphemy is this...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Money? What kind of blasphemy is this...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Money? What kind of blasphemy is this...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? Saw blades...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? Saw blades...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? Saw blades...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They keep chasing me like debt collectors coming to squeeze money out of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They keep chasing me like debt collectors coming to squeeze money out of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They keep chasing me like debt collectors coming to squeeze money out of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once my chainsaw is fired, it never stops.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once my chainsaw is fired, it never stops.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once my chainsaw is fired, it never stops.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want all your limbs shredded, get lost, you halfwits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want all your limbs shredded, get lost, you halfwits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want all your limbs shredded, get lost, you halfwits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, pretty vicious for a kid, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, pretty vicious for a kid, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, pretty vicious for a kid, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But our kid isn't lacking when it comes to being completely unhinged either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But our kid isn't lacking when it comes to being completely unhinged either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But our kid isn't lacking when it comes to being completely unhinged either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Katharina...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Katharina...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Katharina...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know, Junk food!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know, Junk food!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know, Junk food!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O.? Perfect! That should be fun to carve up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O.? Perfect! That should be fun to carve up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O.? Perfect! That should be fun to carve up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fall back, Sister Looper!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fall back, Sister Looper!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fall back, Sister Looper!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ones summoned by Goetia are incorporeal spirits without physical bodies!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ones summoned by Goetia are incorporeal spirits without physical bodies!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ones summoned by Goetia are incorporeal spirits without physical bodies!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are a terrible match for your Counter abilities!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are a terrible match for your Counter abilities!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are a terrible match for your Counter abilities!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, I don't care about that...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, I don't care about that...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, I don't care about that...!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Honestly, you really are
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Honestly, you really are
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Honestly, you really are
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-why did Goetia suddenly close...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-why did Goetia suddenly close...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-why did Goetia suddenly close...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are countless <color=#ffd34c>forbidden books</color> in the Holy Curia's secret library.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are countless <color=#ffd34c>forbidden books</color> in the Holy Curia's secret library.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are countless <color=#ffd34c>forbidden books</color> in the Holy Curia's secret library.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each of them holds a dangerous power...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each of them holds a dangerous power...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each of them holds a dangerous power...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as long as they are books made of <color=#ffd34c>paper</color>, they cannot escape my ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as long as they are books made of <color=#ffd34c>paper</color>, they cannot escape my ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as long as they are books made of <color=#ffd34c>paper</color>, they cannot escape my ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I was the librarian of that place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I was the librarian of that place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I was the librarian of that place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you looked familiar. Now I see why.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you looked familiar. Now I see why.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you looked familiar. Now I see why.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are an apprentice nun of the Holy Curia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are an apprentice nun of the Holy Curia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are an apprentice nun of the Holy Curia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why would a nun who serves the Lord cooperate with a betrayer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why would a nun who serves the Lord cooperate with a betrayer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why would a nun who serves the Lord cooperate with a betrayer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: To begin with, why did you become a heretic?
root.m_Talk_DEU: To begin with, why did you become a heretic?
root.m_Talk_FRA: To begin with, why did you become a heretic?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I entered the Holy Curia was because of a curse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I entered the Holy Curia was because of a curse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I entered the Holy Curia was because of a curse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After my body became one that could only drink the blood of others, I realized something...
root.m_Talk_DEU: After my body became one that could only drink the blood of others, I realized something...
root.m_Talk_FRA: After my body became one that could only drink the blood of others, I realized something...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That the Lord in the heavens saves no one at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That the Lord in the heavens saves no one at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That the Lord in the heavens saves no one at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The end of the world is slowly approaching even as we speak.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The end of the world is slowly approaching even as we speak.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The end of the world is slowly approaching even as we speak.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the depths of the abyss, there are unimaginable beings that could destroy this world on a whim.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the depths of the abyss, there are unimaginable beings that could destroy this world on a whim.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the depths of the abyss, there are unimaginable beings that could destroy this world on a whim.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what is "our" God doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what is "our" God doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what is "our" God doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what about our arrogant priests who call themselves the messengers of God?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what about our arrogant priests who call themselves the messengers of God?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what about our arrogant priests who call themselves the messengers of God?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Father said this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Father said this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Father said this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That the only ones who can save us are ourselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That the only ones who can save us are ourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That the only ones who can save us are ourselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know about Junk food, but I believe those words. So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know about Junk food, but I believe those words. So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know about Junk food, but I believe those words. So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Katharina, look at the sky...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Katharina, look at the sky...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Katharina, look at the sky...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A <color=#ffd34c>whale</color>...? Why is that in the sky...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A <color=#ffd34c>whale</color>...? Why is that in the sky...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>whale</color>...? Why is that in the sky...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could that C.O. be...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could that C.O. be...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could that C.O. be...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, hurry! We must stop the betrayer at once...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, hurry! We must stop the betrayer at once...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, hurry! We must stop the betrayer at once...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Otherwise, something irreversible will happen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Otherwise, something irreversible will happen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Otherwise, something irreversible will happen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you have eyes, then look carefully!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you have eyes, then look carefully!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you have eyes, then look carefully!

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this situation he has brought about, where exactly is salvation supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this situation he has brought about, where exactly is salvation supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this situation he has brought about, where exactly is salvation supposed to be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, like we would...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, like we would...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, like we would...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just let him go, Puppy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just let him go, Puppy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just let him go, Puppy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sis? What do you mean, let him go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sis? What do you mean, let him go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sis? What do you mean, let him go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The situation has changed. Looks like things did not go well for Father either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The situation has changed. Looks like things did not go well for Father either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The situation has changed. Looks like things did not go well for Father either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought he would play that <color=#ffd34c>card</color> within the Society's estate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought he would play that <color=#ffd34c>card</color> within the Society's estate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought he would play that <color=#ffd34c>card</color> within the Society's estate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Card...? You mean that whale?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Card...? You mean that whale?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Card...? You mean that whale?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. The moment he summoned it, we lost any justification to help Father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. The moment he summoned it, we lost any justification to help Father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. The moment he summoned it, we lost any justification to help Father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was the <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> from the start.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was the <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> from the start.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was the <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> from the start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Contract...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Contract...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Contract...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: From here on out, help the Dean of Law and take that thing down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From here on out, help the Dean of Law and take that thing down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From here on out, help the Dean of Law and take that thing down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want to be suspected, you will need to earn some credit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want to be suspected, you will need to earn some credit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want to be suspected, you will need to earn some credit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can handle that, right, Puppy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can handle that, right, Puppy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can handle that, right, Puppy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, what a pain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, what a pain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, what a pain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sis, just what is that whale anyway?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sis, just what is that whale anyway?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sis, just what is that whale anyway?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you serious? It's a Category 5 C.O.?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you serious? It's a Category 5 C.O.?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you serious? It's a Category 5 C.O.?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even within the Grand Dimension Crevice, there's no way a Category 5 would suddenly appear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even within the Grand Dimension Crevice, there's no way a Category 5 would suddenly appear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even within the Grand Dimension Crevice, there's no way a Category 5 would suddenly appear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are currently reviewing the observation equipment and data...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are currently reviewing the observation equipment and data...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are currently reviewing the observation equipment and data...

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, Senior Werner did say that the Counterside Effect can always involve exceptions...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, Senior Werner did say that the Counterside Effect can always involve exceptions...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, Senior Werner did say that the Counterside Effect can always involve exceptions...

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. You contacted the Official Counter on site, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. You contacted the Official Counter on site, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. You contacted the Official Counter on site, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... Miss Ozymandias is currently unreachable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... Miss Ozymandias is currently unreachable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... Miss Ozymandias is currently unreachable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, Ozymandias...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, Ozymandias...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, Ozymandias...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Signature type confirmed. Huh? This data is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Signature type confirmed. Huh? This data is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Signature type confirmed. Huh? This data is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This C.O. has a record of having been neutralized once by the Lotus Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This C.O. has a record of having been neutralized once by the Lotus Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This C.O. has a record of having been neutralized once by the Lotus Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Code Name: <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Code Name: <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Code Name: <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had only heard about it from my mentor. This is my first time seeing it in person.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had only heard about it from my mentor. This is my first time seeing it in person.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had only heard about it from my mentor. This is my first time seeing it in person.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The bizarre incident where an entire city vanished from people's memories, the Great Gyre...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The bizarre incident where an entire city vanished from people's memories, the Great Gyre...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The bizarre incident where an entire city vanished from people's memories, the Great Gyre...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years ago. The result of an incomplete ritual that took place in Lotus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years ago. The result of an incomplete ritual that took place in Lotus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years ago. The result of an incomplete ritual that took place in Lotus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I heard Varunastra was recently neutralized by the Lotus Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I heard Varunastra was recently neutralized by the Lotus Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I heard Varunastra was recently neutralized by the Lotus Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So how are you able to control that thing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So how are you able to control that thing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So how are you able to control that thing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra, you say...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra, you say...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra, you say...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is not its original name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is not its original name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is not its original name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Using Divinity as a medium, I merely summoned a <color=#ffd34c>nameless being</color> from the abyss into reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Using Divinity as a medium, I merely summoned a <color=#ffd34c>nameless being</color> from the abyss into reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Using Divinity as a medium, I merely summoned a <color=#ffd34c>nameless being</color> from the abyss into reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But reality had no vessel capable of containing it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But reality had no vessel capable of containing it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But reality had no vessel capable of containing it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So its rank degraded, and it fused with a ship and its crew that were present there, giving birth to that thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So its rank degraded, and it fused with a ship and its crew that were present there, giving birth to that thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So its rank degraded, and it fused with a ship and its crew that were present there, giving birth to that thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, it was born a malformed abomination from the very start.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, it was born a malformed abomination from the very start.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, it was born a malformed abomination from the very start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Much like us humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Much like us humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Much like us humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I recreated the tragedy of that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I recreated the tragedy of that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I recreated the tragedy of that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that you would struggle even more within this painful reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that you would struggle even more within this painful reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that you would struggle even more within this painful reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By using the Divinity Fragment given to me by <color=#ffd34c>that man</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By using the Divinity Fragment given to me by <color=#ffd34c>that man</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By using the Divinity Fragment given to me by <color=#ffd34c>that man</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That man...? The leader of the cult, I presume?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That man...? The leader of the cult, I presume?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That man...? The leader of the cult, I presume?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The time of revelation draws near.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The time of revelation draws near.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The time of revelation draws near.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then allow me to wish you good luck, Lamda Spatari.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then allow me to wish you good luck, Lamda Spatari.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then allow me to wish you good luck, Lamda Spatari.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I would let you escape...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I would let you escape...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I would let you escape...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am, watch out...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am, watch out...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am, watch out...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A hemomancy barrier...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A hemomancy barrier...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A hemomancy barrier...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness. You're not injured, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness. You're not injured, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness. You're not injured, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are late, Religion Department. And why are you interfering?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are late, Religion Department. And why are you interfering?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are late, Religion Department. And why are you interfering?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry... I was worried you might get hurt, ma'am...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry... I was worried you might get hurt, ma'am...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry... I was worried you might get hurt, ma'am...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why are you making such a fuss even after being saved?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why are you making such a fuss even after being saved?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why are you making such a fuss even after being saved?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you are a department member, show proper respect to a dean.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you are a department member, show proper respect to a dean.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you are a department member, show proper respect to a dean.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Respect? We're about the same age, aren't we? Do we really need that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Respect? We're about the same age, aren't we? Do we really need that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Respect? We're about the same age, aren't we? Do we really need that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that is no way to speak to the Dean of Law!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that is no way to speak to the Dean of Law!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that is no way to speak to the Dean of Law!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please read the room. At this rate, we're both going to get killed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please read the room. At this rate, we're both going to get killed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please read the room. At this rate, we're both going to get killed!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why should I? The only person I watch my attitude around is the one paying me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why should I? The only person I watch my attitude around is the one paying me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why should I? The only person I watch my attitude around is the one paying me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since the situation is urgent, I will postpone etiquette training for later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the situation is urgent, I will postpone etiquette training for later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the situation is urgent, I will postpone etiquette training for later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now, eliminating that C.O. that has trespassed into the Society's estate takes priority.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now, eliminating that C.O. that has trespassed into the Society's estate takes priority.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now, eliminating that C.O. that has trespassed into the Society's estate takes priority.
